content.full_text:
CRABTREE, KARLEN & ARZOO
CERTIFIED PUBLIC ACCOUNTANTS

6356 RIVERSIDE AVENUE
RIVERSIDE, CALIFORNIA 92506-3145
POST OFFICE BOX 2945
RIVERSIDE, CALIFORNIA 92516-2945
TELEPHONE (714) 683-6730
FACSIMILE (714) 369-8071

FPPC
May 23 $ - I'm '90

ROLAND H. CRABTREE (1917-1990)
FRED W. KARLEN
GEORGE A. ARZOO, C.P.A.
SHELLEY Z. FOX, C.P.A.
KAREN A. HOLLENBECK, C.P.A.
DEBRA L. BURR, C.P.A.
GREGG M. KOBASHIGAWA, C.P.A.
JERRY D. WOOD, C.P.A.
J. MICHAEL TWEEDIE, C.P.A.

May 21, 1990

Wayne Imbari
Fair Political Practices Commission
428 J. St.
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Contribution

As a followup to our telephone conversation of Wednesday, May 16, 1990,
it is my understanding that contributions made over $25.00 from individuals
require disclosure of their corporation and employer. If a letter is sent to
obtain this information, but no response is received, the contribution need not
be returned and for reporting purposes, we should indicate on the campaign
statement a request for the information was made. If this is incorrect, please
contact our office.

Yours very truly,

CRABTREE, KARLEN & ARZOO

[signature]

Jerry D. Wood, CPA

JDW/pw

cc: Tom Mullin
